message:
feat(api,cli,terminal,gui,core): add MCP preset tools, GPUI preset UI, enhanced auto-pause, and TickSummary fields

This commit expands the preset system with MCP integration, adds GPUI preset buttons,
enhances terminal auto-pause logic, and ensures TickSummary includes max_age/spike_hits.

## MCP Server Preset Integration (servers.rs)
- Added `list_presets` and `apply_preset` MCP tools
- Tools expose preset discovery and application to LLM agents
- Registered in `ControlToolKind` enum with handlers
- Uses existing `preset_names()` and `preset_patch()` functions

## CLI Improvements (control_cli.rs)
- Fixed serde macro paths: `Deserialize` → `serde::Deserialize`
- Fixed serde macro paths: `Serialize` → `serde::Serialize`
- Ensures proper macro hygiene in preset commands

## Config Test Fixture (main.rs)
- Changed overlay test from `.ron` to `.toml` extension
- Updated test content from RON syntax to proper TOML format
- Validates config layering with correct file format

## GPUI Preset UI (render/lib.rs)
- Added `PresetKind` enum with Arctic/BoomBust/ClosedWorld variants
- Implemented `apply_preset()` method using `submit_config_update`
- Added preset button row in simulation controls panel
- Three buttons: "Arctic", "Boom–Bust", "Closed World"
- Buttons styled consistently with existing UI controls

## Terminal Auto-Pause Enhancement (terminal/mod.rs)
- Moved auto-pause logic from tick loop to dedicated `evaluate_auto_pause()` method
- Added `ControlSettings` import for config access
- Added `last_autopause_tick` field to prevent duplicate event spam
- Expanded `Snapshot` struct with `control: ControlSettings` and `spike_hits: u32`
- Auto-pause now checks three conditions:
  - `auto_pause_on_spike_hit`: pauses on combat spike detection
  - `auto_pause_age_above`: pauses when max age exceeds threshold
  - `auto_pause_population_below`: pauses when population drops
- Logs descriptive event messages for each pause trigger

## Core TickSummary Fix (core/lib.rs, control.rs)
- Added `max_age` and `spike_hits` fields to TickSummary construction
- Fixed control.rs fallback summary to include max_age=0, spike_hits=0
- Ensures DTO conversion works correctly across all code paths

## Documentation (PLAN.md)
- Updated preset system status with GPUI micro-menu note
- Marked MCP preset integration as in-progress

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+### 3) Auto‑pause on conditions [Completed - 2025-10-23 Codex]
 - Purpose: stop at interesting moments automatically.
-- MVP: triggers: population < X (implemented), first spike kill, age > Y.
-- Surfaces: HUD panel with checkboxes/thresholds; TUI toggles; REST patch `control.auto_pause.*` keys; CLI `--auto-pause-below <COUNT>`.
-- Data/Perf: O(1) checks in tick summary; deterministic.
+- MVP: triggers: population < X, first spike kill, age > Y.
+- Surfaces: HUD panel with checkboxes/thresholds; TUI toggles; REST patch `control.auto_pause.*` keys; CLI `--auto-pause-below <COUNT>`, `--auto-pause-age-above <AGE>`, `--auto-pause-on-spike`.
+- Data/Perf: O(1) checks driven by cached per-tick stats; deterministic.
 - Testing: seeded scenarios that cross thresholds → assert paused.
 - Complexity: S.
 
-Implementation progress [2025-10-23]:
-- Config: added `control.auto_pause_population_below: Option<u32>` in `ScriptBotsConfig`.
+Implementation notes [2025-10-23]:
+- Config: `ControlSettings` now exposes `auto_pause_age_above` and `auto_pause_on_spike_hit` alongside the existing population threshold.
+- CLI: new flags/env vars configure population, age, and spike-hit pausing; reflected in emitted config.
+- Terminal & headless: snapshot evaluation auto-pauses and logs the trigger reason, halting the loop and zeroing speed.
+- GPUI renderer: simulation pump honours the same three triggers, pausing and logging via tracing.
 - Terminal & GPUI: main render loops set paused when `agent_count <= limit`.
 - CLI: `--auto-pause-below` (env `SCRIPTBOTS_AUTO_PAUSE_BELOW`) wires into config at startup.
